text: 40 years lady presented with symptoms of hyperparathyroidism and location identified in superior medastinum.
Prevascular space identified between phrenic nerve and vagus nerve.
Medastinal pleura opened with cautery and prevascular space entered.
Soft tissues and lymphatic structures excised with use of harmonic fatty tissue along with the adenoma.

anterior to the arc of aorta is lifted as the location is a difficult location endocyanin green dye is injected and it is observed under camera as green shining parathyroid adenoma in the pre-vascular space after identifying the adenoma properly it is excised completely taking care of aorta and spc
After excision adenoma is delivered in the endo bag.
PTH level dropped to 16 from 370 and final PTH shows no residual adenoma.
